routing_reason: Research site visit cost tied to protocol Visit 3 / Day 14.
evidence_required: EDC visit completed; within visit window; payment schedule line exists; no prior duplicate
block_if: Visit not completed; outside window without exception; duplicate site fee
protocol_basis: Visits 3-7 are treatment-period visits; Visit 3 is Week 2 / Day 14 in the trial flow.

routing_reason: Investigational product administration is research-specific and scheduled by protocol.
evidence_required: Protocol Day 14 IMP administration; EDC visit completed; infusion administration record; amount matches budget; no duplicate
block_if: No infusion record; wrong visit/day; duplicate infusion charge
protocol_basis: TJ301/placebo administrations occur on Days 0, 14, 28, 42, 56, and 70.

routing_reason: PK sampling is research-only, but only applies to patients assigned/consented to PK substudy.
evidence_required: Patient pk_substudy=true; PK sample recorded in EDC/source; payment schedule line exists; no duplicate
block_if: Patient not in PK subgroup; no PK sample record; missing consent/subgroup evidence
protocol_basis: PK is assessed in a subgroup of patients and blood samples are collected according to PK schedule.
notes: Demo row for subgroup condition failure: P-104 is mocked as pk_substudy=false.

routing_reason: Endoscopy is not routinely sponsor-billable at Visit 3 in this demo; protocol support is insufficient for auto-routing.
evidence_required: Explicit unscheduled procedure authorization; PI/CRC note; sponsor approval if research-related; clinical justification if routine care
block_if: No authorization; no EDC/source evidence; no payer rule
protocol_basis: Disease activity assessments occur at Visits 1-8, but endoscopy/biopsy is described for Screening and Visit 8 / Week 12.
notes: Demo row for protocol mismatch / ambiguous payer.

routing_reason: Contracted site administrative cost; billable once per completed visit.
evidence_required: Completed visit; payment schedule line exists; prior ledger shows not already paid for same patient/visit
block_if: Duplicate admin fee for same patient and visit; missing completed visit
protocol_basis: Not protocol-clinical; mocked CTA/budget rule for site operations.
notes: Demo row should be held because prior_payment_ledger shows P-104 Visit 3 admin fee already paid.

routing_reason: Protocol-required disease activity assessment during treatment period.
evidence_required: EDC/source record; Visit 3 completed; payment schedule line; no duplicate
protocol_basis: Clinical assessments of disease activity take place at Visit 3 / Week 2 and other scheduled visits.
notes: Already paid in demo prior ledger, so can also be used to test duplicate behavior if invoiced again.

routing_reason: Safety laboratory testing is protocol-required during treatment visits.
evidence_required: Lab result/source record; completed Visit 3; payment schedule line; no duplicate
protocol_basis: Clinical laboratory tests are collected during treatment-period visits as indicated in the protocol schedule.

routing_reason: ECG is a protocol safety assessment during treatment visits.
evidence_required: ECG source record; completed Visit 3; payment schedule line; no duplicate
block_if: No ECG source record; duplicate; outside visit window without exception
protocol_basis: 12-lead ECG is listed as collected across scheduled visits in the time and events schedule.
notes: Useful if team wants a true protocol-supported ECG example.

routing_reason: Protocol-supported endpoint assessment at End-of-Treatment / Week 12.
evidence_required: Visit 8 completed; endoscopy/source record; biopsy/source record if billed; payment schedule line; no duplicate
block_if: Visit 8 not completed; no procedure record; duplicate
protocol_basis: Endoscopy and biopsies are collected during Screening and Visit 8 / Week 12.

routing_reason: Stable conventional UC therapy is background care, not a research-only procedure in this mock grid.
evidence_required: Medication is clinically indicated; not prohibited by protocol; payer policy allows routine cost; not included in sponsor budget
block_if: Medication is prohibited; consent says free; sponsor budget already covers same item
protocol_basis: Patients should remain on stable conventional UC treatment during the double-blind period and follow-up.
notes: Routine payer example for 'who pays?' story.

routing_reason: No supporting rule in mocked coverage grid or budget.
evidence_required: CTA/budget amendment or billing policy rule required before routing
protocol_basis: Not found in extracted protocol/mock payment evidence.
notes: Optional demo row to show policy gap ticket.
